notes: Retrained with player_profiles JOIN: added p1/p2 serve_wide_pct, first_serve_won, bp_save_pct, return_win_rate, rally_win_rate alongside 6 Elo features (16 total). XGBoost + sigmoid Platt scaling. 83741 hard court training matches (≤ 2022-12-31); 25502 winner profiles, 15416 loser profiles via LEFT JOIN.
